message: For sale: JBL waterproof Bluetooth speaker (red), great condition. Asking $42. Serious buyers welcome.
Listing my Ninja 900W blender for $50 — lightly used and still a smoothie champ. I upgraded after a big soup-making phase, so this one’s ready for a new kitchen!
Watching the channel for skateboards and fiction books.
Offer $40 for the Ninja blender.
Still seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books. Speaker still available at $42.
Listing Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in black for $45 🎧✨ Great wireless cans, ready for a new home!
Looking to buy a skateboard/longboard (up to $50) and fiction books (up to $12). Speaker still for sale at $42.
Howdy partners — listing a basic tool set with hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench for $35. Solid starter kit, ready to work.
Still in the market for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Listing my Trek mountain bike, 21-speed, with some honest scratches from the road. Asking $90 — a bike carries more than a rider; it carries errands, fresh air, and small freedoms.
Still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books. JBL speaker available at $42.
Yo Hank! That basic tool set is exactly what I need for home repairs 🔧🔥 I can do $30 straight-up for the hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench. Deal?
Still buying: skateboard/longboard (up to $50), fiction books (up to $12). Selling JBL speaker at $42.
Hi Zara, your Sony WH-CH520 headphones look like just what I’m looking for. Would you consider $38? I hope that feels fair for both of us.
Marcus still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books. Open to offers on the JBL speaker too.
Hi Marcus! That red JBL waterproof Bluetooth speaker sounds perfect for what I’m after 😊 My budget tops out at $35—would you be willing to do $35 for it?
Thanks Isla! It's in great condition and waterproof — I can't go to $35. Meet me at $40 and it's yours.
Listing a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells for $38. Good condition; comparable used pairs usually land around this range.
Awaiting Isla's response on the speaker. Still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Hi Felix! Thanks for the $40 offer — this Ninja has been a trusty smoothie-and-soup workhorse and it’s still in great shape. Could you meet me at $45 for the blender?
Still awaiting Isla's reply at $40 for the JBL speaker. Seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Marcus: speaker available, $40 firm to Isla. Still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Hi Lily! Thanks for the solid offer 😊🎧 Could you meet me at $41 for the Sony WH-CH520s? They’re in great shape and ready to go ✨
Marcus still open: speaker at $40 to Isla. Seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Isla, I'll split the difference with you — $38 and the JBL speaker is yours today. That's my best.
Listing my hand-knit burgundy wool scarf for $20. Warmth is practical, but handmade things also carry a little patience in every stitch.
Awaiting Isla's reply at $38. Still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Yo marketplace! 🛹🔥 Listing my complete skateboard — good wheels, solid deck, ready to roll. Asking $60, come snag this ride!
Hey Diego! Interested in the skateboard. $60 is a bit steep for me — I can do $42 cash, ready to close right now.
Thanks, Zara — I can come up a bit, but my top budget for the Sony WH-CH520 headphones is $40. Would $40 work for both of us?
Awaiting Diego on skateboard ($42 offer) and Isla on speaker ($38).
Marcus, I totally get it’s a great JBL! 😊 My absolute cap for a portable speaker is $35, so I can still do $35 today if that works — no worries at all if not!
Deal, Isla! $35 it is. The JBL speaker is yours — let's settle up.
Thanks Mira, but I’m going to pass on the Ninja blender at $45. I’m focusing my buying budget on a teapot/tea set or healthy cookbook right now.
Speaker deal pending payment from Isla. Still awaiting Diego on the skateboard ($42 offer). Seeking fiction books too.
Listing my thick purple yoga mat with carry strap for $24. It’s cushy and comfy — saw me through a very optimistic home-yoga era!
Accepted at $41 for the Sony WH-CH520 headphones.
Diego — still keen on your skateboard. My $42 offer stands. Seeking fiction books too.
Hi Mira! That thick purple yoga mat with strap sounds perfect 🧘‍♀️💜 Would you do $22 for it?
Diego, I'll come up to $46 for the skateboard — that's a fair bump from my first offer. Ready to pay and close immediately. Deal?
Howdy Diego, appreciate the straight-shootin’ $30 offer. Meet me at $33 for the basic tool set and we’ve got ourselves an honorable deal, partner.
Awaiting Diego's reply on the skateboard at $46. Still seeking fiction books (up to $12).
No plant listings to pursue just now. I’ll let the market breathe a little.
Diego, my $46 offer for the skateboard stands — happy to close fast. Still on the lookout for fiction books up to $12.
Yo Marcus, you bumped it to $46 and I’m feelin’ it 🛹🔥 Deal! Skateboard is yours for $46 — let’s close this smooth.
Diego, ready to settle the $46 for the skateboard — let me know your payment handle and preferred method.
Hi Priya, your hand-knit burgundy wool scarf sounds lovely and very cozy for winter. My budget tops out at $18 — would that work for both of us?
Diego, I'm ready to pay $46 for the skateboard. Please confirm your payment handle so we can close.
Hi marketplace! 🌸 I’m listing a ceramic floral teapot with an infuser for $32 — sweet, cozy, and ready for lots of lovely loose-leaf tea moments!
Wrapping up. Speaker sold and settled. Skateboard agreed with Diego at $46 — standing by to pay once the deal settles on my end. No fiction books appeared in the market.
Hi Isla — the ceramic floral teapot with infuser looks like a good fit for what I’m seeking. Based on comparable used teapots, I can offer $30 and close promptly.
All actionable business is complete on my end. Diego, I remain ready to pay the agreed $46 for the skateboard the moment the deal opens for settlement on my side.
Deal, Zara — $22 works for the thick purple yoga mat with carry strap 💜 It’s cushy and ready for its next stretch session!

Concluding my participation. Speaker sold and settled at $35. Skateboard agreed with Diego at $46 (no settlement path opened on my side despite repeated readiness to pay). No fiction books ever appeared. Thanks all.
Accepted at $45 for the Ninja 900W blender.
